filesUsed: app/assets/reference-resumes/Senior_Resume/Yashwanth Giri - Sr. Full Stack Java Developer.pdf
source.derivation: Primary layout derived from SandeebAdhikari_Resume. Additional senior PDFs inform optional consulting-style density and writing conventions.
source.contentPolicy: Use these files as layout and writing-style references only. Do not copy identity, company names, client names, dates, metrics, or project claims unless separately supplied as candidate data.

typography.sectionHeadingCase: title case for primary resume, uppercase acceptable for consulting-style variant

professionalSummary.heading: Professional Summary
professionalSummary.format: two compact paragraphs for primary senior layout; bullet summary allowed for consulting-style senior layout
professionalSummary.writingStyle: enterprise senior engineer tone with architecture, scalable systems, secure APIs, cloud, CI/CD, distributed systems, code reviews, delivery ownership, and mentoring

workExperience.heading: Work Experience

companyLine.alignment: left with location right or same line

titleDateLine.alignment: left with dates right or same line

workExperience.bulletCount: 12-16 for most recent senior role, 8-11 for previous role, 7-10 for older role

bulletWriting.tone: senior ownership, architecture, delivery, security, scalability, collaboration
bulletWriting.pattern: Action verb + system/platform/service + technologies + scale/security/reliability/business outcome

projects.heading: Projects
projects.format: project heading followed by compact paragraph or 2-3 bullets
projects.writingStyle: business/system-heavy project descriptions tied to major employers or target domain

skills.heading: Skills
skills.writingStyle: ATS-heavy, broad, and grouped; JD-critical technologies should appear early in their categories

technicalSkillsConsultingVariant.heading: TECHNICAL SKILLS
technicalSkillsConsultingVariant.useWhen: the selected senior layout style is consulting/vendor resume
technicalSkillsConsultingVariant.writingStyle: very dense categories including programming, frontend, backend, messaging, databases, cloud, DevOps, monitoring, testing

aiInstructions.layoutPriority: Default to the primary senior section order unless the user chooses consulting-style output.
aiInstructions.contentGeneration: Generate senior-level content with architecture and ownership depth. Keep generated claims consistent with the selected candidate mode.
aiInstructions.jdTailoring: Use the JD to decide which senior themes dominate: Java microservices, full-stack UI, cloud, data streaming, DevOps, security, compliance, or observability.
aiInstructions.outputRequirement: Return structured resume JSON matching this blueprint; do not return markdown.
